_comment: Pinned reference = the plugin versions the mainline FeedBack host ships. launch.ps1's preflight asserts the dev host's graded-through / borrowed siblings match these, so 'green on my dev host' tracks 'works in the game' instead of drifting silently. Captured from the FeedBack mainline checkout (C:\dev\feedback\repos\feedback\plugins — the default checkout test target) plus the pinned note_detect dev link. RE-CAPTURE on each host-release overlap sweep (ROADMAP standing ritual) and bump capturedDate.
capturedFrom: C:/dev/feedback/repos/feedback/plugins (FeedBack mainline checkout = the default dev host source) + the pinned note_detect dev link at %LOCALAPPDATA%/Slopsmith/plugins/note_detect

note_detect.note: The verifier Virtuoso grades through (pinned dev link, not bundled in the FeedBack checkout). Below 1.15.x the contained-verifier API is absent and grading silently falls back to setVerifyTarget — the 'green notes don't fire' class of ghost.

minigames.note: The host scoring SDK (slopsmithMinigames) the pitch tracker uses. Absent host -> no scoring. FeedBack v0.3.0 ships 0.1.1 (was 0.1.0 on the older Slopsmith reference).

highway_3d.note: Borrowed 3D viz + native hit-flare. The FeedBack checkout ships 3.26.0 (matches); the older legacy Slopsmith host shipped 3.22.0 (drift -> WARN).

nam_tone.note: Optional borrowed amp-capture tone for live input. NOT bundled in the FeedBack checkout (separate install) -> surfaces as a benign WARN.
